close_reason: Python deps cell generation would require pip-to-buck wrapper. Different approach than Go due to Python ecosystem.
description:
Create a Nix-based Python deps cell similar to godeps for Go.

Options to explore:
1. Use poetry2nix for Poetry projects
2. Use pip2nix or mach-nix for requirements.txt
3. Build custom solution parsing pyproject.toml + lock file

The deps cell should:
- Parse pyproject.toml or requirements.txt
- Fetch packages from PyPI
- Generate BUCK files for each package
- Support both native Python and buck2 run
title: Python: deps cell generation from pyproject.toml
